titleStmt.title: SII 11.35: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 35. (B.K. No. 13 of 1927-28). KAVAJGĒRI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE TANK-BUND.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Suvarṇavarsha, i.e., Gōvinda IV and is dated in Śaka 855, Vijaya (= A.D. 933). It records several gifts made by Baḷḷajja, the Gavuṇḍa of Kovujageṟe to the temples and maṭhas constructed by him at Kovujageṟe, Beḷvaṇige and Evaṁgal. The erection of a gavikallu for himself and the stone (—structures) for his two sons, mentioned in the inscription is note worthy. He is stated to have constructed five temples.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . suvarṇnavariṣa śrī prituvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakara rā
jya muttarōttara mabhevriddhe saluttire . sakanripakālatīta saṁvatsara sataṅga ḷeṇṭu nuṟoyvattai
danaya vijayame(ṁ)mbha saṁvatsaraṁ pravarttisuttire kovujageṟeya gavuṇḍa baḷḷajjantanna maḍi
sida dēgulake biṭṭakeyaṁ purvva siddhāya kaṟidukoṇḍarappaḍe kavileyuva kaṟuvuvana
ḻidara lōkake salgu bhaṭariya dēgula vinakana dēgula maṭavamadēra dēgula
va kēsavādityara dēgula siddhēsvara muttammana kallantanna makkaḷirvvara kalla ma
ḍisidantaṁnna gavikalla māḍisida rōṇava paḍedara maga kaṟteyammaṅga Ondaditya
na dānaṁgoṭṭa beḷvaṇigeyaḷondu maṭaviṁgi kauguḍida Eva(ṁ)ṅgallaḷondu dēgula

ke Ondu gadyāṇa vadityaṅgi koṭṭa mattondu Īsvaralayakke koṭṭa dharaṇa Evaṁṅgalla ḷondu
dēgulakke nelana kaṭṭisikoṭṭa padaṅgaligaṁ Ondu narayaṇana dānagoṭṭa paṟdila
dēvayāna dēgulakke koṭṭa nandimakara pratimegaḷanarapaṭṭiga vondaditya
na(ṁ)ndānaṁgoṭṭa kadirmmaḷiga koṭṭanondu li(ṁ)ṅgake Asupaṭṭigamondu dēgulakke navaka
ṇḍada palageyuva koḷanuṁ �kēsva

rake koṭṭa Īppattu kaṇṇugadoḷe paḍisalisa matta koḷagura dēgulakke
kaṇḍapī ṭapaṇiyavaṭṭaminituvaṁ koṭṭu pratiṭṭegeyisida baḷḷajja
niya divasakke darmmasaṁṅgataṁ baḷḷajjaṁ Aydu dēvālayaṁ tandu ke maḍisi
daṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
